query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a dark hoodie with light-colored text, light blue jeans, and gray athletic shoes reclines on a brown couch, resting their head against a blue pillow while holding a dented aluminum can. In the immediate foreground, a wooden table holds several bottles, including a tall clear bottle and two brown beer bottles with labels. The room has tan walls and a wooden floor.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a dark hoodie with light-colored text, light blue jeans, and gray athletic shoes reclines on a brown couch, resting their head against a blue pillow while holding a dented aluminum can, their skin and the room tinted with an unhealthy yellowish cast. Several bottles, including a tall clear bottle and two brown beer bottles, crowd a wooden table in the immediate foreground, the scene captured with the off-kilter, casual framing and cluttered perspective of an amateur snapshot.
